panel.title: 🧠 Armis Centrix Platform Overview
panel.html:
Armis Centrix™ is an AI-powered cyber exposure management platform that provides visibility across the entire enterprise attack surface.

The platform discovers and monitors assets across IT, OT, IoT, IoMT, and cloud infrastructure without requiring agents.

Armis continuously analyzes device behavior, vulnerabilities, communications, and environmental context to identify security exposures across connected assets.

panel.title: 🔐 API Authentication
panel.html:
All Armis API requests require authentication.

POST /api/v1/access_token/

API credentials are generated from:

  • Armis Console → Settings → API Management

The access token returned by the API must be included in the Authorization header of subsequent requests.

panel.title: 🔎 Armis Standard Query (ASQ)
panel.html:
The Armis Standard Query language is used to retrieve datasets using the Armis Search API. 

GET /api/v1/search/?aql=in:devices
GET /api/v1/search/?aql=in:alerts
GET /api/v1/search/?aql=in:activity

ASQ supports filtering by time, attributes, and dataset type.

panel.title: 💻 Devices
panel.html:
Devices represent assets discovered and classified by the Armis platform. 

GET /api/v1/search/?aql=in:devices

Devices may include enterprise IT systems, industrial equipment, IoT devices, medical equipment, and unmanaged network infrastructure.

panel.title: 🚨 Alerts
panel.html:
Alerts represent security detections generated by Armis behavioral analytics. 

GET /api/v1/search/?aql=in:alerts

Alerts may indicate suspicious behavior, policy violations, or anomalous network activity.

panel.title: 📡 Activity Events
panel.html:
Activity events represent telemetry collected from device communications and network interactions. 

GET /api/v1/search/?aql=in:activity

Activity telemetry provides insight into device communications, protocol usage, and behavioral patterns.

panel.title: 📡 Armis Collectors
panel.html:
Collectors provide passive monitoring capabilities and forward telemetry to the Armis Centrix platform.

Collector metadata includes configuration and operational details such as:

  • Collector ID
  • Name
  • Status
  • Creation Date
  • Last Seen
  • System Vendor
  • Product Serial
  • MAC Address
  • IP Address
  • Default Gateway
  • Subnet
  • NTP Servers
  • DNS Servers
  • Https Proxy

panel.title: 🌐 Networks
panel.html:
Networks represent monitored network segments within the Armis platform. 

GET /api/v1/networks/

Network records provide context for device location, segmentation, and connectivity.

panel.title: 🧭 Boundaries
panel.html:
Boundaries define logical scopes used to segment environments within the Armis platform. 

GET /api/v1/boundaries/

Boundaries may represent production networks, industrial zones, healthcare environments, or other segmented operational areas.

panel.title: 🏷️ Device Tagging
panel.html:
Device tags allow administrators to classify and group assets. 

POST /api/v1/devices_tags/

Tags enable grouping of devices by ownership, environment, risk classification, or operational role.

panel.title: 📜 Policies
panel.html:
Policies define behavioral and security rules that monitor device activity across the environment. 

GET /api/v1/policies/

Policy rules evaluate device behavior, communication patterns, and configuration conditions.

When violations occur, alerts or integrations may be triggered.

panel.title: 🔗 Integrations
panel.html:
Integrations connect Armis with external platforms such as SIEM, SOAR, vulnerability management, and ticketing systems. 

GET /api/v2/integrations/

Integrations enable automated response workflows and security telemetry sharing.

panel.title: 📄 Pagination
panel.html:
Large datasets require pagination parameters.

  • length — page size
  • from — record offset
GET /api/v1/search/?aql=in:devices&length=100

panel.title: 🛡️ Vulnerability Intelligence
panel.html:
Armis identifies vulnerabilities affecting discovered assets across enterprise environments.

Exposure analysis combines asset intelligence, threat intelligence, and environmental context.

panel.title: ⚡ VIPR — Vulnerability Prioritization
panel.html:
VIPR prioritizes vulnerabilities based on exploitability, exposure, and threat intelligence context.

This prioritization helps organizations focus remediation efforts on vulnerabilities that represent the greatest risk.

panel.title: 🌐 CVE Intelligence Portal
panel.html:
Armis provides a public vulnerability intelligence portal for researching vulnerabilities affecting connected devices. 

https://cve.armis.com

The portal provides CVE intelligence, exploit context, and device exposure analysis.
